channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Lebanese state media reports Israeli attacks despite announced ceasefire
item.description: The attacks occurred less than a day after diplomats told CBS News that Israel and Hezbollah had agreed to a ceasefire.

item.title: Judge rules DOJ can provide Biden’s discussions with ghostwriter to Heritage Foundation
item.description: A judge has allowed the DOJ to release redacted versions of former President Biden’s conversations with his ghostwriter to the conservative Heritage Foundation.

item.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup schedule and how to watch
item.description: With 104 World Cup games across the U.S., Canada, and Mexico, U.S. captain Tim Ream says it will be like a Super Bowl every day for five weeks.

item.title: Rips appear in Reflecting Pool’s new sealant after algae turns water green
item.description: President Trump’s efforts to renovate the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool hit a snag as algae turned the water green and rips appeared in the new sealant.
